titleStmt.title: SII 23.96: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 96. (A.R. No. 96 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the east wall of the same maṇḍapa Mār. Sundara-Pāṇḍya I: year 20+1: A.D. 1237

summary.p: This is dated in the 20+1st year of Māṛavarman Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva (I) ‘who took the Chōḷa country’. The details of the date are given as Kumbha, śu. 6, Thursday, Śadaiyam which are however found to be irregular.

It records an agreement given by three residents of Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi to measure out in the temple of Nilaiyuḍaiya-Pāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya-Nāyanār, 5 uḻakku of oil every month for the sacred bath of the deity on all the Saturdays of the month. The endowment for this was an ānai-achchu received by them from one Kāmaṉ Tiruvaraṅgaṉ alias Nāvallaṟai Nāyar of [Kuṟama]ttūr in Malai-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hara svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīcoṇāṭu koṇṭaruḷiya śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟkiyāṇṭu 2 10patāvatiṉ
Etirāmāṇṭu kumpanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Āṟāntiyatiyum viyāḻak kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyattunāḷ muḷḷināṭṭu brahmatecam Irācarāca caturvedimaṅkalattu
teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaik kuṟucciyil Uṭaiyār nilaiuṭaiya pāṇṭiśvara muṭaiyanāyaṉāṟku Ivvūr civaṉ caṅkarampāṭiyār viḷaritiruvaṉāṉa nakaramāyilaṭṭiyum paṟppaṉātaṉuṭaiyāṉāṉa mayi
rpālaṉum ceyaṅkoṇṭāṉ Antariyāṉa tiruñāṉacampantaṉum Ivvaṉai vom Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku caṉieṇṇaik
kāppukku malaimaṇṭalattu kuṟamattūr kāmaṉ tiruvaraṅkaṉāṉanāvallaṟai nāyar tammiṭaiya taṉmamākac cellac cantirātittapakal celutta nāka Ivāykkā
potumaikku vaṉ ppatiṉ Anṟāṭunallāṉai Accu 1 Ivvaccu Oṉṟum kaikkoṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Immācammutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku Uḻakkāka mātam Oṉṟu
kku caṉi Añcukku Eṇṇai nāḻi Uḻakkāka vanta Eṇṇai 4 koyilile yaḷantu taravukoḷvomākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittapakal Ivvaccukku Āṭṭu mava
rkaḷ Iccaṉi Eṇṇaikkāppuc celuttuvomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom Ivvūr civaṉ caṅkarappāṭiyāril viḷari tiruva ṉāṉa nakaramāyilaṭ
ṭiyum paṟ ppanātaṉuṭaiyāṉāṉa mayirpālaṉum ceyaṅkoṇṭāṉ Antari yāṉa tiruñāṉacampantaṉum Ivvaṉaivom viḷari tiruvaṉā
ṉa nakaramāyilaṭṭi taṟkuṟikkum paṟppanātaṉuṭaiyāṉāṉa mayirpālaṉ taṟ kuṟikkum ceyaṅkoṇṭāṉ Antariyāṉa tiruñāṉacampantaṉ
kum taṟkuṟimāṭṭeṟi ñcolli Ikkal veṭṭiṉeṉ kaṇṇaṉ Ariyakaṉāna Ālālacuntarattaccaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
